evals.prompt: Create a brand-new Data Co agent named Justin with workspace `/Users/wendy/work/data-co/JUSTIN-quant-workspace`. Put the canonical profile files, SOP placeholder, and runtime spec under Wendy, and make the workspace contain only runtime-state plus symlinks. Do not fabricate memory files.
evals.expected_output: Creates or describes a new-agent initialization flow where canonical files live under Wendy, the target workspace keeps only runtime-state plus symlinks, and no fake memory history is created.

evals.prompt: Onboard a new Content Co distribution agent. Define the required onboarding spec first, then scaffold canonical files under Wendy, then scaffold runtime-state in the target workspace, then validate everything. Keep Reports To singular and make Scope Boundary explicit.
evals.expected_output: Requests or freezes the onboarding fields, scaffolds Wendy-owned canonical files plus workspace runtime-state, and emphasizes singular reporting lines plus explicit boundaries.

evals.prompt: Re-onboard an old legacy agent by migrating its existing notes and memory into a new workspace.
evals.expected_output: Refuses to treat legacy migration as onboarding and states that this skill is for new agent initialization only.
